stemHtml: An identical situation can be experienced by one pilot as exciting in a positive sense and by another pilot as threatening. In both cases:

options.a: both pilots will loose their motor-coordination
options.b: the pilot feeling threatened, will be much more relaxed, than the pilot looking forward to what may happen
options.c: the arousal level of both pilots will be raised
options.d: both pilots will experience the same amount of stress
